metadata.overview: Reads Seneca Z-4RTD-2 temperature sensors via Modbus TCP. Read-only device — no write commands.

telemetry.name: snap
telemetry.description: Full structured snapshot (stats + config), same shape the legacy metrics pull returned.

troubleshooting: A raw reading of 850.0 marks a sensor fault (open RTD circuit).
If readings stall, verify Modbus TCP reachability (address, port, unitId, register).
